title: Expandable inner bag
abstract: The invention discloses a new type of fish pen (1). An inner layer (2) that can be moved inwardly toward the center of the fish pen. This creates a volume of water (15) with a much higher fish density and makes harvesting easier. Associated system, methods, and uses are also disclosed.
claims:
Claims 1 . A specialized fish pen (1 ) that comprises: an enclosing layer (10) that defines an inner surface and outer surface of the specialized fish pen (1 ) ; and a mobile inner layer (2) comprising one or more sections; CHARACTERIZED in that: the inner layer (2) is arranged between the water (15) contained in the fish pen (1 ) and the enclosing layer (10); and the inner layer (2) is attached to the fish pen (1 ) in one or more places at the top of the fish pen (1 ) forming an expandable inner space (21 ) between the inner layer (2) and the enclosing layer (10). 2. The specialized fish pen (1 ) according to any of the previous claims CHARACTERIZED in that the specialized fish pen (1 ) further comprises a inner layer weight (22) that is attached to a bottom portion of the inner layer (2) wherein the inner layer weight (22) helps hold the inner layer (2) toward the bottom of the fish pen (1 ) if the inner space (21 ) expands. 3. The specialized fish pen (1 ) according to any of the previous claims CHARACTERIZED in that the fish pen (1 ) further comprises a three dimensional fish grating (13), with an inside, an outside, and length, with openings large enough to admit fish (14), and is arranged primarily vertically in the fish pen (1 ). 4. The specialized fish pen (3) according to any of the previous claims CHARACTERIZED in that the inner layer weight (22) further comprises a fish herder (220) that comprises a fish herder body (221 ) and a fish herder edge (220), wherein: the fish herder is shaped such that it can pass through the inside of the fish grating (13); the fish herder edge (222) is located along the edge of the fish herder body (221 ) and comprises one or more flexible sections that are preferably at least as large as the variations in the diameter of the inside of the fish grating (13), allowing the fish herder (220) to maintain contact with the inside of the fish grating (13) along the entire inner length of the fish grating (13); and the total width of the fish herder (220) is preferably at least as large as the largest diameter of the inside of the fish grating (13). 5. The specialized fish pen (1) according to any of the previous claims CHARACTERIZED in that the inner layer (2) comprises two or more separate sections. 6. The specialized fish pen (1) according to any of the previous claims CHARACTERIZED in that it comprises an insulating layer (3) comprising one or more sections, where the insulation layer (3) preferably comprises: an inner insulation layer (33) and an outer insulation layer (32) wherein the inner insulation layer (33) is connected to the enclosing layer (10). 7. The specialized fish pen (1) according to claim 6, CHARACTERIZED in that the insulation layer (3) comprises a plurality of sizing means (34) that are arranged in between the inner insulation layer (33) and the outer insulation layer (32). 8. A method of harvesting fish (14) from a specialized fish pen (1) that comprises: an enclosing layer (10); and a mobile inner layer (2); wherein: the inner layer (2) is arranged such that it is in contact with the inside of the enclosing layer (10); an inner space (21) that is the space between the inner layer (2) and the enclosing layer (10); the inner layer (2) is attached to the fish pen (1) in one or more places; and an enclosed body of water (15) in the middle of the specialized fish pen 1 that is in contact with the surface of the inner layer (2) that is opposite the surface of the enclosing layer (10); CHARACTERIZED in that it comprises the following steps: a) obtaining a specialized fish pen in accordance with any of the previous claims; b) increasing the size of the inner space (21) such that the inner layer (2) is moved away from the enclosing layer (10); resulting in c) reducing the size of the body of water (15); and thus d) increasing the density of fish (14) in the body of water (15); and e) harvesting the fish (14) from the body of water (15). 9. A method of harvesting fish (14) from a specialized fish pen (1) according to claim 8 CHARACTERIZED in that a fish grating (13) is arranged in the center 

 of the body of water (15) between steps a) and b); the fish grating (13) extends from near the top to near the bottom of the specialized fish pen (1 ). 10. A method of harvesting fish (14) from a specialized fish pen (1) according to claim 9 CHARACTERIZED in that the harvesting in step f) is aided by pulling a fish herder (220) through the inside of the fish grating (13) towards the surface. 1 1. A method of harvesting fish (14) from a specialized fish pen (1) according to any of claims 8 to 10 CHARACTERIZED in that in step a): the enclosed body of water (15) is moved to the inner space (21 ); and an additional step is performed after step f): g) moving the water from the inner space (21 ) back into the middle of the specialized fish pen (1 ). 12. A specialized fish pen (1) system CHARACTERIZED in that it is comprised of a) a specialized fish pen (1) in accordance with any of claims 1 to 7, b) a bioreactor (4), and c) a three dimensional fish grating (13) with openings large enough to admit fish (14), arranged vertically in the fish pen (1).
